title: [Clone Firm] Warning: [dot]lgt-private.com, [dot]lgt-bp.com and [dot]gestionparticulier-privee.com
text: The Liechtenstein Financial Market Authority (FMA) points out that there is no connection between the e-mail-adresses with the domains [dot]lgt-private.com, [dot]lgt-bp.com and [dot]gestionparticulier-privee.com and the LGT Bank AG, Herrengasse 12, 9490 Vaduz, Liechtenstein (Registration number: FL-0001.122.356-7).   The operators of the e-mail-adresses with the domains [dot]lgt-private.com, [dot]lgt-bp.com and [dot]gestionparticulier-privee.com make unlawful use of the name and logo of LGT Bank AG and offer financial services without authorisation or registration by the FMA. They are not subject to supervision by the FMA.
